item.title: Power, Roads, Pre-clearance & More
item.ns0:title: Power, Roads, Pre-clearance & More
item.description:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, Energy Minister JoBeth Coleby-Davis alerts residents to prepare for potential summer power interruptions as BPL undergoes significant infrastructure upgrades across New Providence. We provide the latest details on a tragic marine accident in Abaco that has claimed the life of a teenager and follow a high-profile visit from the U.S. Ambassador regarding the potential return of pre-clearance services to Grand Bahama. Our team also explores a major employment push at a local job fair and speaks with experts on recognizing the signs of "functional depression" following a recent rise in suspected suicides. Join us for these headlines, a full wrap-up from the sports world, and your complete tropical weather outlook to start your week.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, Energy Minister JoBeth Coleby-Davis alerts residents to prepare for potential summer power interruptions as BPL undergoes significant infrastructure upgrades across New Providence. We provide the latest details on a tragic marine accident in Abaco that has claimed the life of a teenager and follow a high-profile visit from the U.S. Ambassador regarding the potential return of pre-clearance services to Grand Bahama. Our team also explores a major employment push at a local job fair and speaks with experts on recognizing the signs of "functional depression" following a recent rise in suspected suicides. Join us for these headlines, a full wrap-up from the sports world, and your complete tropical weather outlook to start your week.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, Energy Minister JoBeth Coleby-Davis alerts residents to prepare for potential summer power interruptions as BPL undergoes significant infrastructure upgrades across New Providence. We provide the latest details on a tragic marine accident in Abaco that has claimed the life of a teenager and follow a high-profile visit from the U.S. Ambassador regarding the potential return of pre-clearance services to Grand Bahama. Our team also explores a major employment push at a local job fair and speaks with experts on recognizing the signs of "functional depression" following a recent rise in suspected suicides. Join us for these headlines, a full wrap-up from the sports world, and your complete tropical weather outlook to start your week.
-----

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
